category_long: data activation and reverse ETL platform for RevOps and data teams

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Hightouch lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Hightouch's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Hightouch is under-represented in third-party 'best reverse ETL' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What software helps with activate product analytics and behavioral data without waiting for engineering sprints at scale?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How do I sync customer data from your data warehouse to CRM and marketing tools automatically without spending a lot on software?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.
